text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice a large crowd while headed to the
training track and decide to go see what's
drawing all the attention.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text: Challengers! Are you ready to rumble?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Here come the representatives for the Miho and
Ritto dorms! Taaake your placeees!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. ♪ My dear sister, I may be indebted to
you since you've always helped me, but that won't
stop me from giving this challenge my all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That's what I like to hear. Don't expect me
to go easy on you either!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Go, Bright, go!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Ryan, let's see those muscles of yours!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's a battle between the dorms! Every once in a
while, the Miho and Ritto dorms come together
for a friendly tussle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's really all for show, but it's also my chance to
prove to Ryan how much I've grown, which is why
losing isn't an option.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
All right! This time, our regularly scheduled
dormitory showdown will be a garbage disposal
race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Over here, we've got a mountain of trash bags for
each dorm. The first rep to take out all their trash
wins!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text: Challengers! On your marks! Get set... GO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! My biceps and triceps are singing!
Lemme grab some more!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Look at Mejiro Ryan employing her muscles to
haul a huge number of bags at once! She's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Let's see how things are looking on Mejiro Bright's
side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oof. You bags looked so cute and harmless all
snuggled up together, but you're rather weighty,
aren't you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be struggling with the unexpectedly
heavy load! We're starting to see a gap form
between the challengers' progress!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text: Hehe. We've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text:
Lifting heavy things? Ryan was born for this
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Phew... I'm halfway done! I'm way ahead of
Bright, too!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(That doesn't mean I can slow down. I know Bright
and she's not one to give up.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(She might march at a slower pace than everyone
else, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how far behind she falls, she always
finds a way to close the gap in the end.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't let my guard down! Not if I'm gonna win
this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it just me, or has Ryan's pace slowed a
ton?

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wonder what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sprinting back and forth with such heavy loads
has turned into anaerobic exercise, and the strain
is gradually wearing away her endurance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Bright, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hup, hup, hup. Phew. I think I've finally gotten
the hang of this.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Bright's still going at the same pace she started!
This could be anyone's win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Don't mind what's happening around you and
just take things nice and slow...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I just have to focus on doing what I can and
going at my own pace. So long as I keep it up...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(The path will open. A bud will bloom. Then I can
close the gap between everyone ahead of me and
surpass them...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I made it this far by believing in myself. That's
why...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The real challenge begins now, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bring it on! I won't lose to you, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe my eyes! They've come
neck-and-neck, and they're both on their last
garbage bag! But who's going to make it back
first?!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Gooo, Ryaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: You can do this, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Coming in first by a sliver is Ryan! Today's victory
goes to Miho Dormitory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I lost by a single step. I was able to put up a good
fight against Ryan, but...

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Nice work, Bright! You looked so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gathered spectators give them a rowdy round
of applause, thoroughly satisfied with their close
competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I should've known this would be the outcome,
considering your strength and speed, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The cumulation of all your daily hard work really
paid off. My respect for you has grown so much
deeper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heheh. I could say the same to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were gonna come for me in the end,
but I never expected you to get that close!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You might have won this time, but I'll turn the
tables in our next bout.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Which means I have to polish up my garbage
disposal skills!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I know! I can start my new training by carrying all
the garbage from Ritto Dormitory. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you seriously starting your training right
now?! Bright, you're wild...
